storeDir.description: Directory used by the local filesystem storage adapter for baselines and snapshots.

storageBackend.description: Which storage adapter to use. 'local' = filesystem; 'objectstore' = S3-compatible (in-process reference implementation).

author.description: Default author/system identity recorded in snapshot manifests.

signingAlgorithm.description: Asymmetric algorithm used to sign a sealed baseline's canonical content hash.
